name: §6Megalodon
description:
§8Fishing Pet

§7Strength: §c50
§7Ferocity: §c[Ferocity]
§7Magic Find: §b10
§7Fishing Speed: §b[Fishing Speed]
§7Sea Creature Chance: §310%

§6Blood Scent
§7Deal up to §c+150% ❁ Damage §7based on
§7the enemy's missing health

§6Enhanced Scales
§7Doubles the pet's base stats during
§7the §bFishing Festival§7.

§6Feeding Frenzy
§7Increases your chance to catch
§7Sharks during the §bFishing Festival §7by
§a20%§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Baby Megalodon Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aMegalodon§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
